replies.subject: Re: Yoga + Mindfulness Pilot for Hoboken High School Students
replies.body: Hi Trevor, Thanks for reaching out! We're very interested in the program. Can you schedule a demo for next week?

replies.subject: Re: Yoga + Mindfulness Pilot for PS 28 Students
replies.body: Not interested at this time. We have other priorities.

replies.subject: Re: Yoga + Mindfulness Pilot for Sara Gilmore School Students
replies.body: Please send more information about pricing and curriculum.
